Lecture 14 - Generalized Linear Models Activity
The simplest form of GLM uses a normal (Gaussian) distribution with an identity link function. This is equivalent to standard ANOVA
Bill Perry

Lecture 15 - Class Activity ANCOVA
Always test for homogeneity of slopes before proceeding with ANCOVA. If slopes differ significantly between groups, standard ANCOVA is inappropriate.
Bill Perry
